scripts.dev: npm run prisma:generate && npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed && next dev
scripts.worker:build: rm -rf dist-worker && tsc -p tsconfig.worker.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.worker.json
scripts.test:e2e:sqlite: npm run db:test:reset && RUN_DB_E2E=1 DATABASE_URL=file:$(pwd)/prisma/test-e2e.db REDIS_URL= RESEND_API_KEY= AUTH_SECRET=test-auth-secret AUTH_ACCEPT_ANY_EMAIL_CODE=true PLATFORM_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3107 PLATFORM_DOMAIN=localhost PROJECT_PUBLIC_SCHEME=http OAUTH_INTERNAL_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3107 PROJECT_USE_AGENT_MODEL=test PROJECT_DEV_AGENT_MODEL=test npm run test:e2e
scripts.db:bootstrap: npm run db:deploy && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:test:reset: rm -f prisma/test-e2e.db prisma/test-e2e.db-journal && DATABASE_URL=file:$(pwd)/prisma/test-e2e.db npm run prisma:generate && RUST_LOG=info DATABASE_URL=file:$(pwd)/prisma/test-e2e.db node scripts/prisma.mjs db push --skip-generate
